parameters.query:
SELECT
  client_id,
  client_name,
  client_status,
  emails_sent_30d,
  emails_received_30d,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d,
  positive_signals_30d,
  stalled_threads_gt_72h,
  meetings_30d,
  open_actions,
  overdue_actions,
  risk_score_heuristic
FROM v_client_kpis_30d
ORDER BY risk_score_heuristic DESC;

INSERT INTO client_kpi_snapshots (
  client_id,
  snapshot_date,
  risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions
)
SELECT
  client_id,
  CURRENT_DATE,
  risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions
FROM v_client_kpis_30d
ON CONFLICT (client_id, snapshot_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  risk_score_heuristic        = EXCLUDED.risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d = EXCLUDED.avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d        = EXCLUDED.negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions             = EXCLUDED.overdue_actions;

INSERT INTO client_kpi_snapshots (
  client_id,
  snapshot_date,
  risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions
)
SELECT
  client_id,
  CURRENT_DATE,
  risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions
FROM v_client_kpis_30d
ON CONFLICT (client_id, snapshot_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  risk_score_heuristic        = EXCLUDED.risk_score_heuristic,
  avg_team_response_hours_30d = EXCLUDED.avg_team_response_hours_30d,
  negative_signals_30d        = EXCLUDED.negative_signals_30d,
  overdue_actions             = EXCLUDED.overdue_actions;
